name: @spences10/pi-context
description: Searchable local SQLite sidecar that keeps oversized Pi tool output useful without flooding model context
author: Scott Spence <me@scottspence.com>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run build:self
scripts.build:self: vp exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/schema.sql dist/schema.sql
scripts.check: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run check:self
scripts.test: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run build:self && pnpm run test:self
scripts.coverage: pnpm --filter "$npm_package_name^..." run build:self && pnpm run coverage:self
